label: Matricule
parse: a string with three or four digits in a row

label: Visite
parse: a digit that should be one of  0, 6, 18; put 0 if nothing is detected

label: Temps
parse: a digit that should be one of -15, 0, 30, 60; if 14 is detected, replace it with -15

label: Protéine C réactive
parse: a number that should be a float (with a comma or period) or integer

label: Cholestérol total
parse: a number that should be a float (with a comma or period) or integer

label: Triglycérides
parse: a number that should be a float (with a comma or period) or integer

label: Cholestérol-HDL
parse: a number that should be a float (with a comma or period) or integer

label: Cholestérol-LDL
parse: a number that should be a float (with a comma or period) or integer

label: Cholestérol non-HDL
parse: a number that should be a float (with a comma or period) or integer

label: Ratio Chol tot./Chol-HDL
parse: a number that should be a float (with a comma or period) or integer

label: Glucose
parse: a number that should be a float (with a comma or period) or integer

label: Insuline
parse: a number that should be a float (with a comma or period) or integer
